title: Inversodicraea annithomae
taxonomy: Inversodicraea annithomae is a species of flowering plant in the family Podostemaceae. It belongs to the family Podostemaceae, which is a group of aquatic plants commonly known as river weeds. The plant is native to tropical Africa and is a member of the genus Inversodicraea. Within the Podostemaceae family, Inversodicraea annithomae is one of the many species that are adapted to living in fast-moving water. The classification of Inversodicraea annithomae is further divided into various taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species.
